lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: You do not have an appointment.

lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: You do not have an appointment.

lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: An appointment to see the Queen.

lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: First, because it is my job. Second, because she is not in Fortis at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Well where is she then?

lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: She has important business elsewhere in the kingdom. Perhaps when she returns, you'll be able to see her, or perhaps you won't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, those generally are the two options.

lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: Now, if there's nothing else, please move along.

lines.speaker: Helvia
lines.text: If you wish to speak with the Queen, please be quick. She is very busy and does not need you taking up too much of her time.
